channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇸🇬🇧🇦🇺 AUKUS Partners Announce Underwater Drone Project to Protect Sea Cables
item.description: The US, UK and Australia unveiled plans to develop underwater drone technology under their AUKUS military pact, aimed at protecting undersea cables and boosting naval defense capabilities. UK will contribute £150m with the technology expected ready by next year.

item.title: 🇷🇴🇷🇺 Russian Drone Strikes Romanian Apartment Building, Injures Two
item.description: A Russian Shahed drone hit a residential building in Galati, Romania near the Ukrainian border, injuring a woman and her teenage son. Romania confirmed it was a Russian Geran-2 drone and closed a Russian consulate in response, calling the incident reckless.

item.title: 🇪🇨🇨🇴 Ecuador Accused of Meddling in Colombian Presidential Election
item.description: Colombias foreign ministry accused Ecuadorian President Daniel Noboa of deliberate interference after he promised right-wing candidate Abelardo de la Espriella he would lift tariffs, ahead of Sundays polarized presidential election.

item.title: 🇺🇸🌏 US Defense Chief Hegseth Reassures Asia Allies, Calls for Defense Spending
item.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth told the Shangri-La Dialogue that America is not turning its back on Asia despite the Iran war, calling on regional allies to spend 3.5% of GDP on defense while avoiding needless confrontation with China.

item.title: 🇮🇷⚔️ US Navy Fires Missile to Stop Blockade-Breaking Ship Near Iran
item.description: US Central Command says it fired a missile into the engine room of a Gambian-flagged cargo ship that ignored 20+ warnings while trying to breach the Iranian port blockade. Six ships have now been stopped, with 116 redirected.

item.title: 🇱🇧💥 Israel Launches Fresh Strikes on South Lebanon After Evacuation Orders
item.description: Israel carried out airstrikes across southern Lebanon after ordering evacuations from more than a dozen locations, as Lebanons PM accused Israel of pursuing a scorched-earth policy amid ongoing cross-border tensions.

item.title: 🇹🇼⚔️ Trump Roils Waters on Taiwan Independence: Four Key Takeaways
item.description: The US Presidents recent comments on Taiwan have sparked confusion about American policy toward the island. Nikkei analyzes what Trump said and what it means for US-Taiwan-China relations.

item.title: 🇨🇺🇺🇸 US General Holds Rare Meeting With Cuban Military Near Guantanamo
item.description: A US general conducted an unusual meeting with Cuban military officials near the Guantanamo Bay naval base, marking a rare direct military engagement between the longtime adversaries.

item.title: 🇨🇩🦠 WHO Chief Visits Congo Ebola Epicenter, Calls for More Funding
item.description: WHO Director-General Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus visited eastern Congo to rally community response to the Ebola outbreak and called for increased funding as cases outpace containment efforts.

item.title: 🇹🇷🏛️ Ousted Turkish Opposition Leader Draws Thousands in Ankara Protest
item.description: Thousands gathered in Ankara to support Kemal Ozdemir, the opposition leader removed from office, in a major demonstration against Turkeys ruling party amid democratic backsliding concerns.

item.title: 🇨🇳💰 China Expands Digital Yuan Footprint Via Lottery Draws
item.description: China is broadening its digital yuan footprint through lottery draws, pushing fiscal spending through the central bank digital currency in an effort to boost adoption.

item.title: 🇿🇲🦠 Zambia Steps Up Ebola Screening After Suspected Cases Test Negative
item.description: Zambia health officials say two suspected Ebola cases tested negative but are increasing screening measures at border crossings amid regional outbreak concerns.

item.title: 🇨🇴🇪🇨 Colombia Accuses Ecuador of Deliberate Interference in Presidential Election
item.description: Colombias foreign ministry accused Ecuador of meddling in its upcoming presidential election after Ecuadorian President Daniel Noboa discussed tariffs with a right-wing Colombian candidate.

item.title: 🇹🇷🇯🇵 Turkey Sees Strong Potential for Drone Development With Japan
item.description: Turkey is exploring opportunities to develop drone technology in partnership with Japan, as both countries seek to strengthen defense cooperation amid regional security challenges.

item.title: 🇺🇦📜 Hegseth Letter Raises Questions About US Commitment to Ukraine
item.description: A letter from US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has raised questions about continued American support for Ukraine as the war with Russia enters a critical phase.

item.title: 🇮🇷🚢 US Military Says It Turned Away Blockade Runner Trying to Reach Iranian Port
item.description: The US military turned away another ship attempting to breach the Iranian port blockade, continuing enforcement operations as the fragile ceasefire holds.

item.title: 🇦🇲🇪🇺 Russia Recalls Envoy to Armenia Over EU Ties Ahead of Vote
item.description: Russia recalled its ambassador to Armenia in protest over the countrys deepening EU ties ahead of a crucial vote, highlighting tensions over Yerevans Western pivot.

item.title: 🇵🇭🇨🇳 Philippines Remains Under Threat From China Despite Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: Philippines Foreign Minister says the country remains under threat from China despite recent positive talks between Trump and Xi, highlighting continued regional tensions.

item.title: 🇲🇲🇮🇳 Myanmars Junta Chief Heads to India With Eye on China
item.description: Myanmars military chief turned president is visiting India as the country seeks to balance relations between its powerful neighbors amid ongoing civil conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳🛡️ Pentagon Chief Urges Allies to Boost Defense Spending Amid China Alarm
item.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth called on allies to increase defense spending citing alarm over Chinas military buildup during a major Asian security summit.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇯🇵 China and Japan Arent Talking. Will Rare Earth Trade Go Quiet?
item.description: Tensions between China and Japan are affecting their rare earth trade relationship, raising concerns about supply chain security as diplomatic channels remain frozen.

item.title: 🇺🇦🛡️ Russian Region Establishes New Drone Defense Ministry
item.description: A Russian region has created a new ministry specifically for drone defense as Ukrainian strikes change the balance of warfare on Russian territory.

item.title: 🇪🇪🤖 Estonia Installs First Drone Detection Systems on Russian Border
item.description: Estonia has deployed its first stationary drone detection systems along the Russian border, enhancing Baltic state defenses amid ongoing regional tensions.

item.title: 🇨🇳🤖 Chinese Scientists Create Kill-Them-All Algorithm for Drone Warfare
item.description: Chinese researchers have developed an algorithm designed for autonomous drone warfare, raising ethical concerns about AI in military applications.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US Military Boards Tanker Carrying Iranian Oil in Gulf Enforcement
item.description: US forces boarded a tanker carrying Iranian oil as part of ongoing enforcement operations to restrict Irans oil exports during the conflict.
